queries.nl_query: List all servers
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (s:Server) RETURN s.name AS name, s.ip AS ip, s.os AS os, s.tier AS tier ORDER BY s.name

queries.nl_query: Show all CVEs in the system
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (c:CVE) RETURN c.id AS id, c.name AS name, c.cvss AS cvss, c.severity AS severity ORDER BY c.cvss DESC

queries.nl_query: List all microservices
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (m:Microservice) RETURN m.name AS name, m.lang AS language, m.version AS version ORDER BY m.name

queries.nl_query: Show all libraries used in the infrastructure
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (l:Library) RETURN l.name AS name, l.version AS version, l.language AS language ORDER BY l.name

queries.nl_query: Which services use Java?
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (m:Microservice {lang: 'Java'}) RETURN m.name AS name, m.version AS version ORDER BY m.name

queries.nl_query: Find all externally exposed services
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (m:Microservice {exposed: true}) RETURN m.name AS name, m.lang AS language ORDER BY m.name

queries.nl_query: Which servers are in the backend tier?
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (s:Server {tier: 'backend'}) RETURN s.name AS name, s.ip AS ip, s.os AS os ORDER BY s.name

queries.nl_query: What services are hosted on app-server-01?
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (m:Microservice)-[:HOSTED_ON]->(s:Server {name: 'app-server-01'}) RETURN m.name AS name, m.lang AS language ORDER BY m.name

queries.nl_query: What services are affected by Log4Shell?
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH path = (cve:CVE {id: 'CVE-2021-44228'})<-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]-(lib:Library)<-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]-(svc:Microservice) RETURN svc.name AS service, length(path) AS depth ORDER BY depth

queries.nl_query: Which services are vulnerable to Spring4Shell?
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH path = (cve:CVE {id: 'CVE-2022-22965'})<-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]-(lib:Library)<-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]-(svc:Microservice) RETURN svc.name AS service, length(path) AS depth ORDER BY depth

queries.nl_query: Find all services with critical vulnerabilities (CVSS >= 9.0)
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (svc:Microservice)-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]->(lib:Library)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(cve:CVE) WHERE cve.cvss >= 9.0 RETURN svc.name AS service, cve.id AS cve_id, cve.cvss AS cvss ORDER BY cve.cvss DESC

queries.nl_query: Show PCI-scoped services affected by any CVE
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (svc:Microservice {pci_scope: true})-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]->(lib:Library)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(cve:CVE) RETURN svc.name AS service, cve.id AS cve_id, cve.cvss AS cvss ORDER BY cve.cvss DESC

queries.nl_query: What breaks if auth-service goes down?
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (target:Microservice {name: 'auth-service'})<-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]-(affected:Microservice) RETURN affected.name AS service ORDER BY service

queries.nl_query: What is the impact if payment-service fails?
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (target:Microservice {name: 'payment-service'})<-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]-(affected:Microservice) RETURN affected.name AS service ORDER BY service

queries.nl_query: Show upstream dependencies of notification-service
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (target:Microservice {name: 'notification-service'})<-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]-(upstream:Microservice) RETURN upstream.name AS service ORDER BY service

queries.nl_query: What services depend on log4j?
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (svc:Microservice)-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]->(lib:Library {name: 'log4j-core'}) RETURN svc.name AS service ORDER BY service

queries.nl_query: Show the full dependency chain for user-portal
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH path = (root:Microservice {name: 'user-portal'})-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]->(dep) RETURN dep.name AS dependency, labels(dep)[0] AS type, length(path) AS depth ORDER BY depth

queries.nl_query: Trace the path from user-portal to Log4Shell vulnerability
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH path = (svc:Microservice {name: 'user-portal'})-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]->(lib:Library)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(cve:CVE {id: 'CVE-2021-44228'}) RETURN [n IN nodes(path) | n.name] AS chain, length(path) AS hops ORDER BY hops

queries.nl_query: Show all dependencies of auth-service including transitive ones
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH path = (svc:Microservice {name: 'auth-service'})-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]->(dep) RETURN dep.name AS dependency, labels(dep)[0] AS type, length(path) AS depth ORDER BY depth

queries.nl_query: How many services have critical vulnerabilities?
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (svc:Microservice)-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]->(lib:Library)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(cve:CVE) WHERE cve.cvss >= 9.0 RETURN count(DISTINCT svc) AS count

queries.nl_query: Count services grouped by programming language
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (m:Microservice) RETURN m.lang AS language, count(m) AS count ORDER BY count DESC

queries.nl_query: Is db-server-01 affected by any CVE?
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (s:Server {name: 'db-server-01'})<-[:HOSTED_ON]-(svc:Microservice)-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]->(lib:Library)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(cve:CVE) RETURN svc.name AS service, cve.id AS cve_id

queries.nl_query: Does order-service have any known vulnerability in its dependencies?
queries.expected_cypher: MATCH (svc:Microservice {name: 'order-service'})-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]->(lib:Library)-[:HAS_VULNERABILITY]->(cve:CVE) RETURN lib.name AS library, cve.id AS cve_id, cve.cvss AS cvss
